title: angelica maculata
intro: Angelica maculata, also known as spotted angelica or Asian angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds that help to soothe and protect the body. The health benefits of Angelica maculata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Angelica maculata is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Asian cooking, particularly in Chinese and Japanese cuisine.
